title: Harmonizing and aligning life cycle assessments of bio‑based  fertilizers towards environmental footprint methods
author: Natural Resources Institute Finland
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This scientific paper provides key methodological challenges in assessing the     environmental impacts in a more harmonized manner to improve comparability between bio-based fertilizers (BBFs) and products with the same functionality, and for the development of future Product Category Rules (PCRs) for BBFs. This was achieved by a review of LCA modelling practices e.g. Product Environmental Footprint (PEF) guidelines, the European Commission’s general Environmental Footprint (EF) guidance, EDP, ISO 14040 & 14044 standards and scientific literature.  
  This scientific paper is part of Horizon Europe project "Novel procedures and sustainable guidelines to enhance the use of alternative fertilising products”, NOVAFERT.
steps_raw:

This was achieved by a review of LCA modelling practices e.g. Product Environmental Footprint (PEF) guidelines, the European Commission’s general Environmental Footprint (EF) guidance, EDP, ISO 14040 & 14044 standards and scientific literature.  
  This scientific paper is part of Horizon Europe project "Novel procedures and sustainable guidelines to enhance the use of alternative fertilising products”, NOVAFERT.
